name: Summer Squash Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Slice the squash into chunks.
3. Cook the squash in boiling salted water for a few minutes, then drain thoroughly.
4. Make a sauce using butter, grated Cheddar cheese, sour cream, salt, chives, and paprika.
5. Place the squash in a 3-quart casserole dish.
6. Pour the sauce over the top of the squash.
7. Sprinkle bread crumbs evenly on top.
8. Dot with additional butter.
9. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese over the bread crumbs.
10. Bake until heated through, about 30 minutes.
